message:
test(serve,tools): add JWT, header parsing, and adapter unit tests

serve: claimString, claimInt64, claimAudienceContains,
  extractBearerToken, extractAPIKey, isWebSocketUpgrade,
  parseJWT (valid, invalid format, bad base64)
tools: ParseStandardVersion (8 cases), Version.String (4 cases),
  AllTools (presence + uniqueness), LimitedBuffer (4 cases)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
